title: A Density-Based Algorithm for Discovering Clusters in Large Spatial Databases with Noise
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 提出 DBSCAN 密度聚类方法，用密度可达和噪声点处理支持任意形状簇发现。
why_time_tested_zh: 在高引用深度、较高 breadth proxy 和 KDD Test of Time 记录中同时突出，适合说明算法范式如何长期复用。
industry_impact_note_zh: 适合作为高引用与方法复用案例；工业影响表述需最终报告再补具体应用证据。
proposed_research_archetype: Reusable algorithm / 可复用算法范式
archetype_definition: Algorithmic method that becomes a reusable analytic primitive
archetype_rationale: DBSCAN is a named clustering algorithm reused across spatial/data-mining tasks.

title: Snakes: Active Contour Models
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 提出 active contour（snakes）模型，把图像边界检测表述为能量最小化轮廓演化问题。
why_time_tested_zh: citation count 与 recognition lag 都很高，适合说明视觉基础模型经过长期使用后被持续确认。
industry_impact_note_zh: 可讲作视觉分割/轮廓建模的基础案例；具体应用范围需引用论文或综述支撑。
archetype_definition: A conceptual or mathematical modeling frame reused by later work
archetype_rationale: Active contour models frame segmentation as energy-minimizing curve evolution.

title: Graphs over Time: Densification Laws, Shrinking Diameters and Possible Explanations
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 总结大规模真实网络随时间演化的 densification laws 与 shrinking diameters 现象。
why_time_tested_zh: breadth proxy 为 Top 12 最高之一，适合说明长期影响也可体现为跨领域网络分析框架。
industry_impact_note_zh: 适合作为影响广度案例；需避免把 sampled breadth 写成完整引用网络。
archetype_definition: A dataset-backed regularity or law that helps later work reason about a phenomenon
archetype_rationale: Densification and shrinking-diameter observations summarize recurring graph evolution patterns.

title: Multitasking without compromise: a virtual machine evolution
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 讨论虚拟机在多任务场景下的演进，强调隔离、资源管理与性能之间的折中。
why_time_tested_zh: 在 breadth proxy 上表现突出，适合作为系统/语言方向长期影响案例，但自动匹配 DOI 曾出现误配，已标注需人工复核。
industry_impact_note_zh: OpenAlex 自动匹配曾误连到无关论文；最终引用前必须以 ACM/OOPSLA 页面复核。
proposed_research_archetype: Infrastructure/tool platform / 基础设施或工具平台
archetype_definition: A system or runtime design that changes how later software is built or executed
archetype_rationale: The VM evolution paper concerns runtime/platform design tradeoffs.

title: Probabilistic Models of Indexing and Searching
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 系统化讨论概率模型在 indexing 与 searching 中的作用，是早期概率 IR 传统的重要代表。
why_time_tested_zh: recognition lag 达 34 年，适合作为"基础思想很晚被重新确认"的长周期案例。
industry_impact_note_zh: 适合作为最长 recognition lag 案例；具体贡献需结合 SIGIR/IR 文献回顾核查。
proposed_research_archetype: Probabilistic theory/model / 概率理论模型
archetype_definition: A theoretical or statistical model that provides a reusable ranking/search explanation
archetype_rationale: Probabilistic indexing/searching provides an IR retrieval model family.

title: Research Areas in Computer Communication
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 概括计算机通信领域早期研究问题，为后续网络研究议程提供问题框架。
why_time_tested_zh: 早期发表且 recognition lag 很长，适合说明 Test of Time 数据中存在研究议程类贡献。
archetype_definition: A field-defining survey, agenda, or problem framing that organizes later research directions
archetype_rationale: The title and venue indicate a communication-research agenda rather than a single system metric.

title: Modeling TCP Throughput: A Simple Model and Its Empirical Validation
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 给出 TCP throughput 的简洁模型并用实验验证，连接协议机制与可预测性能。
why_time_tested_zh: recognition lag 较短，适合对比“较快进入共同知识”的网络测量/模型类论文。
proposed_research_archetype: Measurement model / 测量与性能模型
archetype_definition: An empirical model that makes a system behavior measurable and comparable
archetype_rationale: The TCP throughput model links a simple formula to empirical validation.

title: Object Recognition from Local Scale-Invariant Features
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 提出尺度、旋转等变化下稳定的局部特征方法，即后续广泛使用的 SIFT 思路。
why_time_tested_zh: 高 citation count 且为视觉主题代表，适合说明方法组件如何成为领域工具链。
industry_impact_note_zh: 可作为视觉方向代表案例；工业应用表述需另补应用/专利/教材证据。
proposed_research_archetype: Reusable algorithm / 可复用算法范式
archetype_definition: Algorithmic method that becomes a reusable analytic primitive
archetype_rationale: SIFT is a reusable local-feature method for visual recognition pipelines.

title: Mining Association Rules Between Sets of Items in Large Databases
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 提出大规模交易数据库中的 association rule mining 问题和高效规则生成思路。
why_time_tested_zh: 数据库方向高引用代表，适合说明从具体数据挖掘任务到通用分析范式的扩散。
industry_impact_note_zh: 适合作为 Database / Systems 和 Citation 模块共同案例。
proposed_research_archetype: Reusable algorithm / 可复用算法范式
archetype_definition: Algorithmic method that becomes a reusable analytic primitive
archetype_rationale: Association-rule mining introduced a reusable pattern-mining task/formulation.

title: Ad-hoc On-Demand Distance Vector Routing
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 提出 AODV 按需路由协议，用于无基础设施移动自组织网络中的路径发现与维护。
why_time_tested_zh: citation count 很高且来自移动网络方向，适合说明网络协议类论文的长期复用。
industry_impact_note_zh: topic 自动标为 HCI 不准确，已在人工标签中改为 Networking。
proposed_research_archetype: Protocol/system design / 协议或系统设计
archetype_definition: A concrete network/system design later used as a baseline, comparison point, or operational pattern
archetype_rationale: AODV is a mobile ad hoc routing protocol design.

title: Fast Algorithms for Mining Association Rules in Large Databases
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 提出 Apriori 等快速 association rule mining 算法，推动大规模频繁项集挖掘。
why_time_tested_zh: 高 citation count 且与 SIGMOD 1993 案例形成连续技术线索，适合讲数据挖掘方法成熟。
industry_impact_note_zh: 适合与 association-rule problem formulation 作为成对案例。
proposed_research_archetype: Scalable algorithm engineering / 可扩展算法工程
archetype_definition: An algorithmic improvement focused on making a known analytical task efficient at scale
archetype_rationale: The paper focuses on fast algorithms for large-database association-rule mining.

title: Network Information Flow
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 提出 network information flow / network coding 框架，说明网络中间节点编码可提升多播传输能力。
why_time_tested_zh: citation、breadth 与 recognition lag 都较高，适合作为理论思想跨网络与信息论扩散的案例。
industry_impact_note_zh: 适合作为理论和网络交叉的代表案例；报告中需注明获奖来源字段来自 seed。
archetype_definition: A theoretical result or abstraction that changes what later systems/research can reason about
archetype_rationale: Network information flow is a foundational network-coding theory paper.
